## Operator variable

Declarative expression operator tokens.

**Signature:**

```typescript
Operator: {
    readonly ACCESS: "access";
    readonly EQUALS: "==";
    readonly GREATER_THAN: ">";
    readonly GREATER_THAN_OR_EQUALS: ">=";
    readonly LESS_THAN: "<";
    readonly LESS_THAN_OR_EQUALS: "<=";
    readonly NOT: "!";
    readonly NOT_EQUALS: "!=";
    readonly AND: "&&";
    readonly OR: "||";
}
```
